buildCommand: if [ "$VERCEL_ENV" = "production" ] && [ -n "$DATABASE_URL" ]; then n=0; until pnpm exec prisma migrate deploy; do n=$((n+1)); if [ $n -ge 5 ]; then echo "prisma migrate deploy failed after $n attempts"; exit 1; fi; echo "migrate deploy retry $n/5 (advisory lock contention?) — sleeping 10s"; sleep 10; done; else echo "Skipping prisma migrate deploy (VERCEL_ENV=$VERCEL_ENV)"; fi && next build
